narrative_arc: Miranda envies the attention busty asari Samara gets -> secretly uses biotics that night to enhance her own curves -> shows off the new body to the crew -> a hit from Wrex plants the idea of strength enhancement -> she pumps biotics into muscle growth, escalating past control -> grows to cosmic/universe scale, clothing destroyed, screaming for MORE POWER -> ends as an 'absolute' macro-muscle goddess in space (cover-gag back to status quo pin-up)

panels.notes: Title cover: Miranda in white catsuit, rear-three-quarter glute-forward hero pose against a planet-rise sky. 'Art by Boogie / GrowGetterComics' credit lower-right. Establishes the glute/lower-body niche up front.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; single-image cover, glute-forward low-hero framing sets the niche.

panels.notes: Establishing: the Normandy ship banking over a planet, 'Somewhere in Century system' caption. Clean spatial setup.
Two male crew (Joker + bearded officer) chatting, 'Patrol day just got better!' Level two-shot, talking heads.
Glute close-up in the catsuit framed by the harness ring; CLICK SFX = the men photographing her. The leer is the inciting beat. body_part_focus glutes.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=1; establishing wide + crew banter + glute CU, the men's CLICK voyeurism sets up Miranda's envy engine.

panels.notes: Miranda strides down a ramp toward the men, 'Sup, boys? See something you like?' Low-angle full figure, good depth.
Two-shot of the men complimenting ('your ass is out of this galaxy'). Talking heads over starfield.
Miranda reacting pleased, 'Thanks, I guess? Any kind words for the twins?' Chest-up, hand to collar.
Men reply 'About them...' Reaction two-shot, low energy.
Miranda turning slightly deflated as the compliment pivots away from her. Sets up the jealousy.
Bearded officer thumbs-up, 'I think Samara got you beat on that department.' The wound that drives the plot. Flat inset.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=5; heavy dialogue page, mostly flat-level talking heads except the low-hero ramp entrance (p1). Plot wound delivered: Samara out-busts her.

panels.notes: Samara (red-suited asari) posing confidently at a holo-console, hyper-busty, chest-forward. She is the envy target. Low-hero.
Miranda + crew watching from behind/right, arms crossed, 'Whoa!' Samara large in FG, onlookers smaller. Good scale-contrast.
Inset CU of Miranda's face, eyes down, jealous/scheming. The 'I can fix this' seed before the night scene.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=1; Samara reveal with scale-contrast staging, closes on Miranda's scheming CU. Motivation fully loaded.

panels.notes: 'Later that night...' Miranda sits on her bunk edge in underwear, brooding, 'Must be nice getting all that attention like Samara.' Quiet beat.
She brightens, 'I KNOW! Maybe I can use...' The idea lands. Chest-up, lit by the realization.
Grinning, hands rising into frame beginning to glow. Bridge into the trigger.
TRIGGER: biotic energy (blue particles) erupts from her cupped hands thrust toward camera, 'BIOTICS!' Hands foreshortened. The catalyst for transformation #1.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=3; quiet bunk setup escalates to the biotic trigger; VWOOMP/BIOTICS SFX launch the first growth. Counts as growth page (trigger).

panels.notes: Miranda flashing double peace-signs, chest swelling, 'Just a little bit of enhancement...' Biotic glow over the bust.
Head thrown back, mouth open, 'Oh... This feels...' Peak-pleasure face mid-growth. Strong expression beat.
Hips/glutes ballooning under shorts, biotic sparkle. Lower-body growth money-shot. body_part_focus glutes.
Tight on the swelling rear filling frame, double FWOOMP. Pure glute ECU growth-focus, no face. Niche payoff.
Hand on swelling midriff/waist, abs/core tightening; SFX-driven. Growth-focus body detail.
Result panel: noticeably bigger bust + curves, hands lifting the chest, 'HELL YEAH!' First-tier transformation lands.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=4 (MS/CU/ECU); flat_panel_count=1; the curve-growth money page - multi-panel-progressive across chest->glutes->abs->result with VWOOMP/FWOOMP throughout and an ecstasy CU. Best growth coverage of the first scene.

panels.notes: 'The next day...' Joker + officer at the cockpit, 'What the hell are you looking at?' Reaction setup to her entrance.
Officer gesturing toward enhanced Miranda, crew in FG, 'By Hera's Milky Way...' Depth staging.
Enhanced bust foregrounded in the catsuit, men craning up; CLACK = bootsteps/photos. Low-hero shows off the result.
ECU of her lips smirking, 'SMIRK' rendered as SFX. Confident button on the reveal.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=4; flat_panel_count=1; aftermath show-off page - reaction-intercut between gawking crew and the enhanced result, capped by a smirk ECU. No active growth.

panels.notes: Miranda standing tall on a platform, hands on hips, 'Top of the day, boys & girls!' Towering low-hero full figure, crew small in FG.
OTS past a male crewman gawking up, 'Those are HUUUGEE...!' Reaction shot.
Redheaded female crew + male in FG reacting, 'GASP!' Reaction-intercut closes the aftermath of scene 1.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; strong low-hero hero-shot + OTS reaction-intercut. Good staging variety despite being a static reveal page.

panels.notes: Samara and the enhanced Miranda side by side, 'M-Miranda...' / 'Samara.' Two rivals now comparable in build. Standing two-shot with depth.
OTS on Samara conceding, 'I see you've made some steps for... self-provements!' Miranda: 'Really? Sweet of you to notice.' The rivalry beat pays off.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; rival face-off dialogue, OTS framing keeps it from going flat. Closes the jealousy arc, but pacing slows here.

panels.notes: 'A while later...' Miranda stretching back in a console chair, 'Ahhh! That's enough of all these reports!' Slightly high angle, roomy depth.
She walks off past a large red-armored figure (Wrex, krogan), 'Time to see if I'll get more drinks with these babies!' Wrex looms in FG.
She walks face-first into Wrex's armor, 'OOF!' BUMP! impact star. Comedic collision that seeds the strength idea.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; transitional buildup; the Wrex collision (p3) is the plot pivot toward strength enhancement. Good angle variety (high/eye).

panels.notes: Miranda knocked to the floor by the immovable krogan, 'Ooohh... That felt like I hit a wall.' Wrex's huge red arm reaches in. THUD. Big scale-contrast.
OTS over Miranda toward Wrex, 'Wrex!' / 'You good, Miranda?' Establishes the size gap she now resents.
Wrex boasts 'Krogan blessed me with indomitable strength and smoldering good looks.' Miranda eyes him, 'I guess... but damn, you're quite strong!' The new envy: strength.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; the strength-envy is verbalized here, mirroring the page 3-4 bust-envy setup. Wrex's bulk drives the scale-contrast in every panel.

panels.notes: Wrex walks off (red armor exiting FG), Miranda thinks 'He wasn't even fazed...' The wound that triggers scene 2.
Miranda turning thoughtful/scheming, 'Hmm... Maybe a bit of strength enhancement could come handy in the field.' The plan forms.
TRIGGER #2: she clenches a fist, biotic glow flaring at the forearm, VWOOMP. Launches the muscle-growth scene (the comic's spine).

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=1; mirror of the first trigger but aimed at muscle. VWOOMP relaunches active growth; the long peak sequence begins next page.

panels.notes: Gritted-teeth strain, one arm curled into a swelling bicep that balloons with a BAAM, biotic burst. 'That's it... just a bit more...' Strong strain face + arm money-shot.
Bicep explodes larger toward camera, BA-BAAM, wide grin/eyes, 'NICE!' Foreshortened flexing arm dominates frame. Escalation locked in.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; tight two-panel bicep escalation with rising SFX (BAAM->BA-BAAM) and peak strain/ecstasy faces. zoom-escalation + sfx-driven in action.

panels.notes: Low ECU on torso: abs beginning to carve under the sports bra, biotic glow, RUMBLE. Faceless midriff growth-focus.
Same framing, abs now fully cut + thighs thickening, BAAAM. Stage-to-stage progression on the same body region.
Rear-view ECU, glutes ballooning, multiple BULGE SFX, 'FUCK YEAH!' Glute money-shot - the title-promised lower-body payoff. growth-focus glutes.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1 (all ECU); flat_panel_count=0; classic multi-panel-progressive on abs->glutes with stacked SFX. Monotonous distance but maximal zoom coverage; the niche glute beat lands (p3).

panels.notes: FULL-BODY REVEAL: Miranda hits a double-biceps pose, now heavily muscled (huge arms, cut abs, thick legs) yet still busty, 'That's what I'm talking about!' Low-hero splash-style result of the muscle build.
ECU of her grinning face from below, devilish grin, 'What if... I want to go a little further?' The fatal escalation hook into the cosmic act.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; full-body-reveal of the muscle tier + a menacing face ECU that turns the story from 'enough' to 'MORE.' Best single hero composition of the book (p1).

panels.notes: Wild-eyed grin/snarl, arms now grotesquely huge, triple VWOOMP, 'HAAAAH!!' Past the point of control. Intense face.
CLOTHING-DESTRUCTION: the sports bra tears off (RIIIPP), chest + pecs exploding outward, head thrown back screaming. The restraint breaks here.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; the turn from 'enhancement' to 'overload' - clothing-destruction (RIIIPP) + peak rage/ecstasy faces + stacked SFX. Pacing accelerates hard into the cosmic finale.

panels.notes: Tilted-back ecstatic/overwhelmed face, eyes rolling, 'OH MY... HAAAHH!' Reaction-intercut at the top of the growth surge.
Hair wild, fully muscled torso bursting all remaining gear, KRAGOOOOOM x2, screaming 'MORE!! MORE!!' + maniacal 'HAHAHAHAHA!!!' The power-mad turn. Big SFX-driven beat.
Continuation of the screaming surge (overlapping the big SFX); body swelling further as the panel borders dissolve into the energy. Reads as one escalating moment.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; the 'MORE!!' hinge - giant onomatopoeia (KRAGOOOOOM) + maniacal laughter drive a wordless-power sensation. Strong sfx-driven escalation.

panels.notes: Full-page: now planet-scale, the tiny Normandy ship dwarfed against her body, floating in space, 'MORE POWER!!' KATHOOM. size-comparison (ship) makes the macro-scale legible. Splash escalation.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; splash. The ship-as-size-reference (scale-contrast) is the cleverest growth device on the page - sells planetary scale instantly. full-body-reveal at cosmic tier.

panels.notes: Full-page: floating in the cosmos mid-laugh-scream, even larger, planets behind her, 'YES... YES!!! / MORE FUCKING POWER!' Pure peak, full-body-reveal.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; near-repeat of p18's cosmic splash - escalation by repetition. Slightly redundant with p18/p20 but sustains the climax.

sfx: MORE POWER THAN THE WHOLE UNIVERSE COMBINED!
panels.notes: Full-page: front-on, arms raised, lightning (KRZZAP) crackling around a heart-shaped energy aura, 'MORE POWER THAN THE WHOLE UNIVERSE COMBINED!' The grandiosity peaks here.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; third cosmic splash - the megalomaniac line is the verbal climax. Lightning FX adds variety vs the prior two but the trio of full-page splashes (18-20) blurs together.

panels.notes: CLIMAX SPLASH: maximally muscled goddess on a clean white void, one fist crackling overhead, mid-stride diagonal, 'I. AM. ABSOLUTE!' The money-shot the whole book builds to - clean negative space isolates the figure.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; the climactic hero splash - white-void isolation + dynamic diagonal stride make it the strongest single image. End of the transformation arc.

panels.notes: Back-matter commission ad ('SLOTS OPEN FOR COMMISSIONS!', 'Boogie here!', price guide $90/$140/$180, socials @boogiedraws). NOT story content - it is the artist's promo page. Confirms creator = Boogie.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; non-story commission advertisement. Excluded from growth ratio; included only because it is one of the 23 supplied files and it confirms authorship.

panels.notes: Back-cover pin-up: pre-transformation Miranda in the white catsuit, rear-three-quarter glute-forward, looking back smiling (status-quo reset / cover callback). Credits: 'Art by Boogie / Commissioned by Kray1170 / Produced by GrowGetterComics.com.'

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; back-cover pin-up mirroring p1; full credit block confirms art=Boogie, commissioner=Kray1170, publisher=GrowGetterComics.

strengths: P14 runs a textbook multi-panel-progressive: three stacked ECUs grow abs->abs->glutes stage-by-stage on the same body region with layered VWOOMP/BAAAM/BULGE SFX - exactly the device the pipeline wants more of.
P18's size-comparison sells cosmic scale instantly by floating the tiny Normandy ship against her thigh; one fixed reference does what a paragraph of prose can't.
P21's 'I. AM. ABSOLUTE!' climax splash isolates the figure on a clean white void with a dynamic diagonal stride - the strongest single composition and a model money-shot.
SFX escalation is consistent and legible: BAAM->BA-BAAM (p13), RIIIPP clothing tear (p16), KRAGOOOOOM/KATHOOM/KRZZAP (p17-20) carry the growth sensation even when dialogue drops out.
Expression intensity stays high through the peak (p13 strain=5, p16 rage=5, p17-21 ecstasy/rage=5); faces consistently register the overload, never going dead during the money pages.
Two-act envy engine is clean: bust-envy (Samara, p3-4) and strength-envy (Wrex, p10-11) each trigger a transformation, giving the growth a motivated cause rather than a random potion.
weaknesses: P3 is five consecutive flat-level talking-head panels (only the p1 ramp entrance breaks the level eyeline); the dialogue has almost no camera movement - the book's flattest stretch.
Camera angle is monotone in the finale: every cosmic page (p17-21) is the same low-hero front/three-quarter framing - no high, dutch, aerial, or POV variety to differentiate five climactic pages.
Pages 18-20 are three near-identical full-page cosmic splashes ('MORE POWER' / 'YES YES' / 'MORE POWER THAN THE UNIVERSE'); escalation-by-repetition pads the climax and blurs the beats together.
Distance spread collapses during the peak: p14 is all-ECU and p16/p18/p19/p20 are single-distance pages, so the back half loses the wide/medium/tight rhythm that p6-7 had.

Story is thin and ends abruptly on the climax splash (p21) with no consequence, comedown, or cliffhanger pull-forward; the back-cover pin-up (p23) silently resets her to baseline with no in-story explanation.
The first transformation (p5-6) is comparatively rushed - only two pages and one result panel - so the curve-growth act under-delivers zoom coverage relative to the much longer muscle act.
